name: lok8s
description: Kubernetes from laptop to production — one CLI and one folder convention over kustomize, Helm (khelm), kind and Tilt. Dev-first, deploys to any cluster; optional Hetzner provisioning via the KubeOne/CAPI drivers.

scripts.lint: find .lok8s operator/hooks -type f -name '*.sh' | xargs shellcheck --shell=bash --severity=warning && grep -rlE '^#!/usr/bin/env (argsh|bash)' .lok8s operator/hooks | xargs shellcheck --shell=bash --severity=warning
